canonical_definition: A named entity recognition pre-training dataset based on Wikipedia and Wikinews, containing 164K English instances with 17 label names, used as a baseline for IE pre-training.
papers: AXIS: Efficient Human-Agent-Computer Interaction withAPI-FirstLLM-Based Agents
Autoregressive Speech Synthesis without Vector Quantization
